title: RBI Simplifies Upper Layer NBFC Classification with ₹1 Lakh Crore Asset Threshold
description:
RBI has amended the Scale Based Regulatory Framework by making asset size of ₹1 lakh crore the primary criterion for identifying Upper Layer NBFCs and simplifying the classification process.
The post RBI Simplifies Upper Layer NBFC Classification with ₹1 Lakh Crore Asset Threshold appeared first on TaxGuru.
